litellm_mode.title: LiteLLM Mode
litellm_mode.description: Use the built-in Elitea LiteLLM proxy or connect to an external instance.

litellm_database_mode.title: Database
litellm_database_mode.description: Use the shared Elitea database or a custom PostgreSQL connection string.

litellm_db_name.title: LiteLLM Database Name
litellm_db_name.description: Database name for LiteLLM on the shared PostgreSQL server. Uses POSTGRES_* env vars for host/credentials.

external_litellm_url.title: External LiteLLM URL
external_litellm_url.description: Base URL of the external LiteLLM instance (e.g., https://litellm.example.com/llm).

litellm_master_key.title: Master Key
litellm_master_key.description: API key for authenticating LiteLLM proxy requests.

log_request_response_data.title: Log Request/Response Data
log_request_response_data.description: Store full prompts and completions in LiteLLM spend logs.

allow_project_own_llms.title: Allow Projects to Bring Own LLMs
allow_project_own_llms.description: When disabled, only public project models are available to all projects.

sync_llm_entities.title: Sync LLM Entities
sync_llm_entities.description: Reconcile all teams, keys, and models across all projects. Long-running operation.

import_llm_models.title: Import Models from LiteLLM
import_llm_models.description: Discover unmanaged models in LiteLLM, create configuration records, and update team access for all projects.

seed_llm_keys.title: Seed Project Keys
seed_llm_keys.description: Create missing LiteLLM teams and API keys for all projects. Use after initial setup or if projects are missing access.
